candidate.completion: put me on hold with customer service so a robot checks in on me every 30 seconds.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me on hold with customer service so a robot checks in on me every 30 seconds.

evaluation.rationale: A clear comic reversal turns loneliness into a request for impersonal, scheduled contact, and the robot check-in image lands with real human truth. The idea is fresh and logically coherent, but the sentence is longer and less shapely than the strongest wit, which weakens its compression and elegance.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
